hooks.command: USERNAME=$(git config user.name | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | tr ' ' '-'); DOC="docs/contributors/${USERNAME}.md"; STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only); OTHERS=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -E '^docs/contributors/[^/]+\.md$' | grep -vx "$DOC" || true); if [ -n "$OTHERS" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: you are '$USERNAME' but staged contributor doc(s) belonging to others:"; echo "$OTHERS"; echo "Each contributor must only edit docs/contributors/${USERNAME}.md. Unstage the others."; exit 1; fi; if ! echo "$STAGED" | grep -qx "$DOC"; then echo "BLOCKED: $DOC is not staged. Update it with current status (branch, task, blockers, date) and stage it before committing."; exit 1; fi

PreToolUse.description: Block commit unless current user's contributor doc is staged AND no other contributor docs are staged
